title: Feature Root: Improve takt init onboarding with stack selection menu
description: Shared execution root for implementing canonical stack selection during `takt init`, including prompt flow updates, onboarding hint alignment, and shared validation, documentation, and review follow-ups.
acceptance_criteria: Interactive `takt init` uses numbered menus for runner and stack selection.
Stack selection drives overridable defaults for test and build/check commands.
Non-interactive init uses Python defaults sourced from the shared stack catalog.
Implementation, validation, documentation, and review are coordinated through this feature tree.
